title: avena thorei
intro: Avena thorei, also known as Avena byzantina, is a type of wild oat grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and calming effects. The health benefits of Avena thorei include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Avena thorei can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
